reviews.review_description: It has 18+ things on it bro there’s kid on oculus to. And people are joining my lobby and putting inappropriate things. let me watch in peace.
Just what I was looking for.  Great to be able to share my favorite videos with friends.

Few glitches on first release but all seems to be working now thanks to the hard work of the Devs.  This kind of functionally should be native to YouTube, but alas isn't so the Devs did what Devs should do and Get It Working:)

developer_response.body: Thanks!!! Check out the latest version -- I think the glitches are hopefully fixed? Check it out and if you think they are -- if not, please let us know so we can improve. Have a great day :)

reviews.review_title: Like Bigscreen but for Quest users
reviews.review_description: I was always frustrated in Bigscreen because you can only stream from a PC. In Couch, all I need is my Quest to watch videos with my friends.

reviews.review_title: I didn't realize it until now...
reviews.review_description: ...but this exquisitely simple, effective, and 'cozy' VR social platform is made by the Cheerio people, which makes perfect sense. The whole server/matchmaking thing on the left is really easy to use and stuff.
I'll be on the couch.

reviews.review_title: Great hang out or date idea
reviews.review_description: My partner and I love to watch YouTube videos, so this app is perfect for us! Great app to use if you’re looking for a fun hang out or date idea with friends, partners, whoever in VR
Perfect for watching YouTube with friends! One thing, please spawn us in farther away from each other. I need my personal space, haha!
Is a good place to watch videos together

reviews.review_title: I’m sorry but this app is pretty bad
reviews.review_description: This app is pretty bad with the new update, most of the videos are unavailable. If it gets better I’ll check it back out until then you should use big screen.

The game used to be good and fun but one of the new updates made it so you could not watch anything pg 13 witch is the age requirement for oculus if you want more freedom go to big screen beta (I will delete this review when the developers change the age filter) 
PS I feel bad writing this review but me and my can’t watch what we want to watch  because of the age filter but people can put on beast feeding vids but I can’t watch horror videos

The user interface is horrible.. Buttons are off screen, and you can't simply navigate and find videos.

And dropping everyone in a public room 0 on first launch? That's nice.
I do love trying to find a video only to suddenly have a kid screaming at me to buzz off (just not with those exact words)

I recommend deleting this if you've installed it. It's complete trash

developer_response.body:
Hi roguewolfe, sorry that your first experience was so weak. I believe our latest version fixed the buttons off screen you spoke about, and it's much easier to navigate videos now too...

We're talking as a team about how to handle the lobby scenario you've described...we like making it easy to find new people to watch with, but we get that sometimes those aren't the ones in the lobby...

Stay tuned while we work to improve...a big part of our growth comes from having strong reviews, so if you think our improvements made the app better, we'd certainly appreciate you reconsidering and potentially updating your 1/5 star review so our average would go up...

Have a good day

reviews.review_description: This app is really good to use with my girlfriend!

reviews.review_title: Great to watch youtube with other people
reviews.review_description: I was watching soccer by myself and then someone joined me and showed me a funny music video. i love couch!

So the app works fine , videos play in sync with other people and the sound quality is perfect but when I want to choose a video to myself the cookies screen shows up and I can't get rid of it because the I AGREE button is off of the screen. 

Simply put the YouTube screen is scaled up too much and the buttons are off the screen , it can probably be fixed easily .

If that issue is fixed I will give it a 5 stars but overall great app and lots of fun :)

developer_response.body:
Hello! Good news - we fixed the problem you're describing in our latest version. Try it out and if it works for you, we'd certainly appreciate your updating your star rating :)

Have a great day

reviews.review_description:
Sit on a couch and watch youtube, it wasn't working last time I tried it but worked fine this time and I even found someone watching stuff in a public room. Don't worry there are private rooms too. This app is great for Oculus Quest 2 users who want to watch YouTube socially as its free and works fine. 

Featured in Oculus Quest Seated Games Video - https://youtu.be/Naxha7wgbDQ

developer_response.body: We're so happy you're enjoying couch! If you'd like to connect, join our discord https://discord.gg/Qrka4xpsaw

reviews.review_title: why is it in restricted mode?
reviews.review_description: I used to watch Half Life VR But The AI Is Self Aware with my friend and now we can’t because restricted mode is on now

reviews.review_title: Great concept, pls change the lobby.
reviews.review_description: I was really looking forward to something like this as we've been searching multiplayer viewers with my friends for a long time! But... No. Nothing's as off-putting as getting thrown in the middle of a bunch of kids screaming at each other and watching some crap (literally, as there was a horse pooping on the screen). This is your "lobby"? No. Give us a lobby that actually lets us decide whether we want to join strangers or not, and don't make us search for a quick escape within just two seconds spent in your app. Because it's free I'll give 2/5.

developer_response.body: Hi! This is great feedback - want you to know that we have updated it now so when you open Couch, you are sent to your own private room. Hope this improves the experience for you! Be sure to update the app to get this updated feature. If you want, let us know what you think by updating your review, cheers

reviews.review_title: kinda down by the remove of some videos
reviews.review_description: this game is really good it’s just that in the latest update they got rid a lot of videos
